problem_text_cn:
4-25 光滑水平面上有一小孔，轻细线穿过小孔，两者间无摩擦。细线一端连接质量$m_1$的小球，另一端在水平面下方连接质量$m_2$的小球，$m_1$绕小孔作半径$r_0$的圆周运动时，$m_2$恰好处于静止状态，如图4-22所示。
(1) 试求$m_1$圆运动角速度$\omega_0$。
(2) 假设$m_1$有径向小扰动，$m_2$有相应的竖直方向小扰动，此时可将$m_1$与孔的距离表达式$r(t)=r_0+\delta(t)$，其中$\delta(t)$是随时间变化的小量。试证明$\delta$随$t$的变化是简谐振动，并导出振动角频率$\omega_s$与$\omega_0$间的比值。
problem_text_en:
4-25 There is a small hole on a smooth horizontal plane. A light thin thread passes through the hole without friction. One end of the thread is connected to a small ball of mass $m_1$, and the other end, below the plane, is connected to a ball of mass $m_2$. When $m_1$ moves in a circular path of radius $r_0$ around the hole, $m_2$ stays exactly at rest, as shown in Figure 4-22.
(1) Find the angular velocity $\omega_0$ of the circular motion of $m_1$.
(2) Assume that $m_1$ undergoes a small radial perturbation and $m_2$ a corresponding small vertical perturbation. Then the distance between $m_1$ and the hole can be expressed as $r(t)=r_0+\delta(t)$, where $\delta(t)$ is a small time‑dependent quantity. Prove that $\delta$ varies with $t$ as a simple harmonic oscillation, and derive the ratio of the oscillation angular frequency $\omega_s$ to $\omega_0$.
problem_solution_cn:
解 (1) 设线中张力为$T$，则有
$$ m_{2}g=T=m_{1} \omega_{0}^{2} r_{0},\quad \omega_{0}=\sqrt{\frac{m_{2}g}{m_{1} r_{0}}}. \quad \text{①} $$
(2) 有扰动时，$m_1$有径向速度$v_r$和角向速度$v_{\theta}$之分，$m_2$有竖直方向的速度，可用$v_r$代表。有
$$ v_{r}=\frac{d r}{dt},\quad v_{\theta}=r\frac{d\theta}{dt}=r\omega,\quad \omega=\frac{d\theta}{dt}. \quad \text{②} $$
$m_1$相对小孔角动量守恒，有
$$ m_{1} r^{2} \omega=m_{1} r_{0}^{2} \omega_{0},\quad \text{即}\quad \omega=\frac{r_{0}^{2} \omega_{0}}{r^{2}},\quad \text{③} $$
$$ \frac{d^{2} \theta}{dt^{2}}=\frac{d \omega}{d t}=\frac{d}{d t}\left(\frac{r_{0}^{2} \omega_{0}}{r^{2}}\right)=-2\frac{r_{0}^{2} \omega_{0}}{r^{3}}\frac{d r}{d t}=-2\frac{r_{0}^{2} \omega_{0}}{r^{3}} v_{r},\quad \text{④} $$
系统机械能守恒，有
$$ \frac{1}{2}(m_{1}+m_{2}) v_{r}^{2}+\frac{1}{2} m_{1} v_{\theta}^{2}+m_{2} g(r-r_{0})=E_{0},\quad \text{⑤} $$
式中$E_{0}$为恒量。上式两边对$t$求导，得
$$ (m_{1}+m_{2}) v_{r}\frac{d v_{r}}{d t}+m_{1} v_{\theta}\frac{d v_{\theta}}{d t}+m_{2} g\frac{d r}{d t}=0,\quad \text{⑥} $$
将$ \frac{d v_{\theta}}{d t}=\frac{d r}{d t} \omega+r\frac{d \omega}{d t}=v_{r} \omega-2\frac{r_{0}^{2} \omega_{0}}{r^{3}} v_{r} $，⑦
等式代入⑥式，相继得
$$ (m_{1}+m_{2})\frac{d^{2}r}{d t^{2}}+m_{1}r\omega\left(\omega-2\frac{r_{0}^{2} \omega_{0}}{r^{3}}\right)+m_{2} g=0,\quad \text{⑦} $$
将③代入⑦
$$ (m_{1}+m_{2})\frac{d^{2}r}{d t^{2}}-m_{1}\frac{r_{0}^{2}\omega_{0}^{2}}{r^{3}}+m_{2} g=0,\quad \text{⑧} $$
将$ r=r_{0}+\delta,\quad \frac{d^{2}r}{d t^{2}}=\frac{d^{2}\delta}{d t^{2}} $
代入⑧，相继得
$$ (m_{1}+m_{2})\frac{d^{2}\delta}{d t^{2}}-m_{1}\frac{r_{0}^{2}\omega_{0}^{2}}{r_{0}^{3}}\left(1+\frac{\delta}{r_{0}}\right)^{-3}+m_{2} g=0,\quad \text{⑨} $$
$$ (m_{1}+m_{2})\frac{d^{2}\delta}{d t^{2}}-m_{1}r_{0}\omega_{0}^{2}\left(1-3\frac{\delta}{r_{0}}\right)+m_{2} g=0,\quad \text{⑩} $$
将①式$ (m_{2}g=m_{1}r_{0}\omega_{0}^{2}) $代入⑧得
$$ \frac{d^{2}\delta}{d t^{2}}=-\frac{3m_{1}}{m_{1}+m_{2}}\omega_{0}^{2}\delta. \quad \text{⑪} $$
(⑪式与水平弹簧振子振动方程$ \frac{d^{2}x}{d t^{2}}=-\frac{k}{m}x $的数学结构一致)故$\delta$随时间$t$的变化是简谐振动，振动角频率为
$$ \omega_{s}=\sqrt{\frac{3m_{1}}{m_{1}+m_{2}}}\omega_{0}, $$
$\omega_s$与$\omega_0$的比值为
$$ \frac{\omega_{s}}{\omega_{0}}=\sqrt{\frac{3m_{1}}{m_{1}+m_{2}}}. $$
problem_solution_en:
Solution (1) Let the tension in the thread be $T$; then
$$ m_{2}g=T=m_{1} \omega_{0}^{2} r_{0},\quad \omega_{0}=\sqrt{\frac{m_{2}g}{m_{1} r_{0}}}. \quad \text{①} $$
(2) When perturbed, $m_1$ has a radial velocity $v_r$ and an angular velocity $v_{\theta}$, and $m_2$ has a vertical velocity, which can be represented by $v_r$. We have
$$ v_{r}=\frac{d r}{dt},\quad v_{\theta}=r\frac{d\theta}{dt}=r\omega,\quad \omega=\frac{d\theta}{dt}. \quad \text{②} $$
Angular momentum of $m_1$ about the hole is conserved:
$$ m_{1} r^{2} \omega=m_{1} r_{0}^{2} \omega_{0},\quad \text{i.e.}\quad \omega=\frac{r_{0}^{2} \omega_{0}}{r^{2}},\quad \text{③} $$
$$ \frac{d^{2} \theta}{dt^{2}}=\frac{d \omega}{d t}=\frac{d}{d t}\left(\frac{r_{0}^{2} \omega_{0}}{r^{2}}\right)=-2\frac{r_{0}^{2} \omega_{0}}{r^{3}}\frac{d r}{d t}=-2\frac{r_{0}^{2} \omega_{0}}{r^{3}} v_{r},\quad \text{④} $$
Mechanical energy of the system is conserved:
$$ \frac{1}{2}(m_{1}+m_{2}) v_{r}^{2}+\frac{1}{2} m_{1} v_{\theta}^{2}+m_{2} g(r-r_{0})=E_{0},\quad \text{⑤} $$
where $E_{0}$ is constant. Differentiating ⑤ with respect to $t$ gives
$$ (m_{1}+m_{2}) v_{r}\frac{d v_{r}}{d t}+m_{1} v_{\theta}\frac{d v_{\theta}}{d t}+m_{2} g\frac{d r}{d t}=0,\quad \text{⑥} $$
and using $ \frac{d v_{\theta}}{d t}=\frac{d r}{d t} \omega+r\frac{d \omega}{d t}=v_{r} \omega-2\frac{r_{0}^{2} \omega_{0}}{r^{3}} v_{r} $, ⑦
substituting into ⑥ yields successively
$$ (m_{1}+m_{2})\frac{d^{2}r}{d t^{2}}+m_{1}r\omega\left(\omega-2\frac{r_{0}^{2} \omega_{0}}{r^{3}}\right)+m_{2} g=0,\quad \text{⑦} $$
Insert ③ into ⑦:
$$ (m_{1}+m_{2})\frac{d^{2}r}{d t^{2}}-m_{1}\frac{r_{0}^{2}\omega_{0}^{2}}{r^{3}}+m_{2} g=0,\quad \text{⑧} $$
Now set $ r=r_{0}+\delta,\quad \frac{d^{2}r}{d t^{2}}=\frac{d^{2}\delta}{d t^{2}} $
and substitute into ⑧, giving successively
$$ (m_{1}+m_{2})\frac{d^{2}\delta}{d t^{2}}-m_{1}\frac{r_{0}^{2}\omega_{0}^{2}}{r_{0}^{3}}\left(1+\frac{\delta}{r_{0}}\right)^{-3}+m_{2} g=0,\quad \text{⑨} $$
$$ (m_{1}+m_{2})\frac{d^{2}\delta}{d t^{2}}-m_{1}r_{0}\omega_{0}^{2}\left(1-3\frac{\delta}{r_{0}}\right)+m_{2} g=0,\quad \text{⑩} $$
Using ① $ (m_{2}g=m_{1}r_{0}\omega_{0}^{2}) $ in ⑧ yields
$$ \frac{d^{2}\delta}{d t^{2}}=-\frac{3m_{1}}{m_{1}+m_{2}}\omega_{0}^{2}\delta. \quad \text{⑪} $$
(Equation ⑪ has the same mathematical structure as the equation for a horizontal spring oscillator $ \frac{d^{2}x}{d t^{2}}=-\frac{k}{m}x $.) Hence $\delta$ varies with $t$ as a simple harmonic oscillation, with angular frequency
$$ \omega_{s}=\sqrt{\frac{3m_{1}}{m_{1}+m_{2}}}\omega_{0}, $$
and the ratio of $\omega_s$ to $\omega_0$ is
$$ \frac{\omega_{s}}{\omega_{0}}=\sqrt{\frac{3m_{1}}{m_{1}+m_{2}}}. $$
img_cn:
图4-22展示了一个物理装置：光滑水平面上有一个小孔，一根轻细线穿过小孔，一端连接质量为$m_1$的小球，该小球在水平面上绕小孔作圆周运动；另一端连接质量为$m_2$的小球，该小球位于水平面下方并保持静止。图中标注了小孔、两个小球、细线以及$m_1$的圆周运动半径$r_0$。

 图4-22是理解问题几何构型的关键，显示了系统在平衡状态下的布置。
img_en:
Figure 4-22 illustrates a physical setup: a smooth horizontal plane with a small hole, a light thin thread passing through the hole, one end connected to a ball of mass $m_1$ that moves in a circular path around the hole on the plane; the other end is connected to a ball of mass $m_2$ located below the plane and at rest. The figure labels the hole, the two balls, the thread, and the radius $r_0$ of the circular motion of $m_1$.

 Figure 4-22 is essential for understanding the geometric configuration of the problem, showing the arrangement of the system in equilibrium.
problem_answer:
(1) $\omega_0 = \sqrt{\dfrac{m_2 g}{m_1 r_0}}$。
(2) $\delta(t)$ 作简谐振动，角频率 $\omega_s = \sqrt{\dfrac{3m_1}{m_1 + m_2}}\omega_0$，比值 $\dfrac{\omega_s}{\omega_0} = \sqrt{\dfrac{3m_1}{m_1 + m_2}}$。
